title: Botfly
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Botflies''' were tiny flying [[Insect/Legends|insects]] native to the lower levels of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Boba Fett: Pursuit]]''
